news.title: Popular park entrance closed for police investigation in DeKalb County
news.summary: This is a developing story. We have a reporter and photographer at the scene working to gather all the latest details, for Channel 2 Action News.

news.title: 2 found dead near Doll's Head Trail in DeKalb County
news.summary: DeKalb County police are investigating after two people were found shot and killed inside a popular county park on Friday morning.

news.title: Man dies in hit-and-run on Bouldercrest Road in DeKalb County
news.summary: A man was found dead overnight along Bouldercrest Road in DeKalb County after being struck by a vehicle, police said.

news.title: Mom arrested after 4-year-old girl shot multiple times in Monroe
news.summary: A 4-year-old girl is currently in intensive care at an Atlanta-area hospital after suffering multiple gunshot wounds.

news.title: Teen shot and killed on I-285 in road rage dispute
news.summary: DeKalb County police are investigating a deadly late-night road rage shooting that left a teenager dead along the shoulder of Interstate 285 near Spaghetti Junction.

news.title: Death investigation shut down I-285 near Buford Highway for hours
news.summary: Channel 2 Action News was on the scene near Interstate 85 with several police and fire units.

news.title: Atlanta man didn’t answer his door, so his friend got worried. They found him dead inside
news.summary: Martell Mapp, 30, was found dead in his Vine City home more than a month ago.

news.title: 51-year-old killed in 'targeted' shooting inside car on MLK Jr. Drive in Atlanta, police say
51-year-old man shot and killed on Martin Luther King Jr Drive NW
news.summary: Atlanta police officers are investigating a deadly shooting after a man was killed Thursday night on Martin Luther King Jr. Drive NW.

news.title: Man found shot to death inside car outside Atlanta convenience store
news.summary: Atlanta police are investigating a deadly shooting on Thursday night.

news.title: Supervisor at Conyers Real-Time Crime Center arrested for allegedly using Flock system to track partner's location
news.summary: The Conyers Police Department said the supervisor "made multiple inquiries into the vehicle driven by her domestic partner in order to ascertain his location."

news.title: Homicide suspect arrested in death of 19-year-old woman
news.summary: Atlanta Police said on Thursday that 19-year-old Amari Haugabook was in custody and being interviewed by detectives.
